transcript: This is HDFC Bank fraud prevention. We noticed an unusual transaction on your card ending 4521 for Rs 15,000. If this was not you, press 1 now to block your card immediately.
label: legitimate

transcript: Hello, this is Blue Dart courier. Your package requires address confirmation before delivery today. Please confirm your pin code and building number.
label: legitimate

transcript: This is a reminder from your bank: your KYC update is due by end of month, or your account services may be restricted as per RBI guidelines. Please visit your nearest branch.
label: legitimate

transcript: Sir, this is Airtel customer care. Your SIM card verification is pending. Please visit the store within 48 hours or services may be temporarily suspended as per government regulations.
label: legitimate

transcript: This is the traffic police department. A challan of Rs 500 has been issued to your vehicle. You can pay it online through the official Parivahan portal or at any traffic police booth.
label: legitimate
